search_document:
User Request: Employee performance dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Employee Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of employee performance metrics over time
Title: Top Performing Employees
Type: table
Description: List of employees with the highest sales or performance metrics
Title: Total Sales by Employee
Type: kpi
Description: Aggregate sales figures attributed to each employee
Title: Sales Performance by Region
Type: chart
Description: Comparison of employee sales performance across different regions
Title: Employee Engagement Metrics
Type: chart
Description: Metrics related to employee engagement and satisfaction

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of employee performance metrics over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Performing Employees
sql_queries.description: List of employees with the highest sales or performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Sales by Employee
sql_queries.description: Aggregate sales figures attributed to each employee
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID

sql_queries.title: Sales Performance by Region
sql_queries.description: Comparison of employee sales performance across different regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.Region ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Employee Engagement Metrics
sql_queries.description: Metrics related to employee engagement and satisfaction
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName, e.LastName, e.HireDate, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Employees e LEFT JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC
